title: Drodi's Assortments
description: My personnal compilation of Minecraft texture experiments and ideas.
body:
![a render showcasing a side by side comparison of the vanilla crafting table and planks to mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66f18750eeefebd7161878aa216afaba286c0f42.png)

**Drodi’s Assortments** is my personal compilation of Minecraft experiments. Its assets mostly consist of _texturing experiments_ and _unique ideas_. 

Right now, its key features are:

- A revamped crafting table with new textures
- An updated oak planks texture
- A redesign for the enchanting table


<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>
The only official versions of my resource packs are available on:

> Curseforge: [**Dordinatteur**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects)
> 
> Modrinth: [**Drodi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi)
> 
> Planet Minecraft: [**Drodi**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/)

Any other website may host unauthorized reuploads, which could contain viruses or malware. If you choose to download from unofficial sources, you do so at your own risk.

If you suspect that someone is reuploading my resource packs without permission and action can be taken, please contact me on Discord: drodi99.

</details>


<details>
<summary>CREDITS</summary>

- [Reijvi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/reijvi/) : General inspiration for the style of the pack. Multiple color palettes are re used from his pack, "[Reimagined](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-reimagined-5096190/)", including leather and iron. Versions pre v2 had a smoker and blast furnace design using his fire animation.

</details>
